title: Full Stack Intern
description:
Job description
 



  





 Role Overview
 



 We are seeking a Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in JavaScript and React who can design, build, and deploy end\\-to\\-end web applications. You will play a key role in building tools and a user platform enhancing user engagement, and ensuring that our digital platforms are scalable, responsive, and visually compelling.
 



  





**﻿Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop, and deploy end\\-to\\-end web applications using JavaScript, React, Node.js, and modern frameworks.
* Enhance and optimize the website and web pages, improving UI/UX and overall performance (
 **lazy loading, code splitting, caching, etc.** 
 ).
* Collaborate closely with product and design teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions and ensure the
 **final output matches design**

 .

 .
* 
* Prior experience building websites for startups or SaaS products.



  





 What We Offer
 


* Opportunity to lead the digital development of a fast\\-growing career platform.
* Competitive Stipend.

 📍 Location: Remote

title: Calling all Software Engineers!
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

**🚀 We're Hiring Engineers Across All Levels! 🚀**
 Are you ready to build the future with us? At
 **ValGenesis** 
 , we're scaling rapidly and expanding our engineering teams across multiple functions. Whether you're a seasoned expert or an emerging talent, we have exciting opportunities for you to grow, innovate, and make an impact.
   

  

**Location:**
 Our Offices are in the following locations:
   

  

 Chennai: Taramani, Chennai
   

  

 Bengaluru: Bengaluru, Karnataka
   

  

 Hyderabad: Ranga Reddy, Telangana
   

  

 🔧 What We’re Hiring For 🔧:
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers with
 **2 to 12 years of experience** 
 across a variety of disciplines, including but not limited to:
   

  

**Software Engineering** 
 (Frontend, Backend, Full Stack)
   

  

**DevOps \\& Infrastructure**
**Data Engineering \\& Analytics**
**Machine Learning \\& AI**
**Quality Assurance \\& Automation**
**Embedded Systems \\& Hardware**
**Product \\& Platform Engineering**
 🌟 What You’ll Do 🌟:
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to design, build, and scale cutting\\-edge solutions.
   

  

 Solve complex technical challenges with creativity and efficiency.
   

  

 Contribute to a culture of innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement.
   

  

 🎯 What We’re Looking For🎯 :
   

  

 Proven experience in engineering roles (2–12 years).
   

  

 Strong problem\\-solving skills and a passion for technology.
   

  

 Ability to work in a fast\\-paced, collaborative environment.
   

  

 Experience with modern tools, frameworks, and methodologies relevant to your domain.
   

  

**Ready to take the next step?**
 Apply now. Let’s build something amazing together.
   

  

**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 BeeBark is a dynamic digital platform dedicated to transforming architectural commerce and professional networking within the design and construction sector. Our mission is to empower architects, builders, interior designers, and real estate developers by offering innovative tools that enable them to showcase their work, attract high\\-quality clients, and expand their professional networks. We address critical industry challenges such as talent visibility and collaboration inefficiencies through customized digital solutions, strategic advertising, and content\\-driven engagement strategies. As we grow, our goal is to simplify hiring processes and foster a trusted ecosystem where professionals and companies can discover and collaborate seamlessly. Our vision is to create an integrated environment that merges architectural commerce, service discovery, and real estate activities into a cohesive digital ecosystem.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented and motivated part\\-time Web Developer to join TheBeeBark team remotely. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and implementing web applications that are responsive, functional, and user\\-friendly. Your responsibilities will encompass both front\\-end and back\\-end development tasks, supporting website maintenance, troubleshooting issues, and enhancing the overall functionality of our digital tools. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including designers and project managers, to support BeeBark’s mission of connecting architectural professionals through innovative digital solutions. This position offers flexibility, allowing you to contribute your expertise from anywhere while being part of a forward\\-thinking organization committed to technological advancement and industry disruption.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Experience building custom websites with both frontend and backend development
* Proficiency with drag\\-and\\-drop platforms such as Webflow, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, and Framer
* Ability to convert Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect, responsive websites
* Experience deploying and managing hosting environments
* Efficiency in handling revisions and client iterations
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


**Core Skills Required**
* Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Experience with React or Next.js (preferred)
* Knowledge of Node.js or PHP for backend development
* API integration experience
* Strong understanding of responsive design implementation


**Additional Skills**
* Experience with at least two of the following drag\\-and\\-drop platforms: Webflow, WordPress (Elementor or custom themes), Shopify, Wix, Framer
* Performance optimization skills
* Basic understanding of SEO best practices
* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with hosting services such as Vercel, cPanel, or AWS basics


 Ideal candidates will possess a proactive ownership mindset, demonstrate fast and efficient execution, communicate clearly, respect deadlines, and manage multiple website projects simultaneously. A problem\\-solving attitude and the ability to adapt to evolving project requirements are essential for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain custom websites and digital tools, ensuring they are visually appealing, functional, and responsive across devices
* Convert Figma design files into fully operational websites with pixel\\-perfect accuracy
* Collaborate with design and content teams to implement new features and enhancements
* Support website deployment, hosting management, and performance optimization
* Handle revisions, client feedback, and iterative improvements efficiently
* Troubleshoot and resolve website issues promptly to minimize downtime
* Integrate third\\-party APIs and tools to extend website functionalities
* Ensure all websites adhere to best practices for SEO, accessibility, and security
* Maintain documentation of development processes and project progress
* Stay updated with the latest web development trends and technologies to continuously improve skills and project quality


**Benefits**
* Gain exposure to a fast\\-paced agency environment with diverse projects
* Opportunities for professional growth, including potential advancement into a Tech Lead role
* Work directly with the founder and a passionate team committed to innovation
* Experience the startup ecosystem, fostering entrepreneurial skills and networking opportunities
* Performance\\-based growth opportunities, rewarding quality work and initiative
* Flexible remote work arrangement allowing for work\\-life balance


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 TheBeeBark is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team fosters innovation and drives our success, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join our team and contribute to our mission.

title: Software Developer
description:
Full Stack Software Developer (ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server, React) \\- Job DescriptionAbout the Company
   

  

 CES is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable software products and services. With a strong focus on customer satisfaction and technological excellence, CES has established itself as a trusted partner for organizations seeking to leverage cutting\\-edge digital solutions. Our company values collaboration, continuous learning, and a commitment to excellence, fostering an environment where talented professionals can thrive and make impactful contributions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a passionate and experienced Full Stack Software Developer to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will possess a deep expertise in ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server, with a proven track record of building high\\-performance, user\\-centric web applications. This role involves developing scalable backend solutions, integrating APIs, and collaborating closely with front\\-end developers and designers to create seamless, responsive enterprise applications. Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS and experience with modern frameworks like React are highly desirable. The successful candidate will play a key role in driving innovation, optimizing application performance, and ensuring the delivery of high\\-quality software products that meet our clients’ needs.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Overall 3\\-6 years of relevant experience in software development, with a focus on full\\-stack development.
* Extensive experience in backend development using ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server.
* Hands\\-on experience with .NET Core back\\-end systems and designing RESTful APIs.
* Familiarity with version control systems such as Git, and continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.
* Knowledge of AWS cloud services and MongoDB is a plus.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively within cross\\-functional teams.
* Proactive problem\\-solving abilities and a keen eye for detail in coding and application design.


**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable and secure backend solutions using ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server to meet project requirements.
* Collaborate with front\\-end developers and UI/UX designers to ensure smooth integration of APIs and frontend components.
* Implement RESTful APIs and ensure their performance, security, and scalability.
* Stay updated with the latest industry trends and incorporate innovative technologies and practices into development processes.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging to ensure high\\-quality deliverables.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of development workflows, tools, and methodologies.
* Assist in deployment and monitoring of applications on cloud platforms such as AWS.


**Benefits**
 CES offers a competitive benefits package designed to support our employees' well\\-being and professional growth. Our benefits include comprehensive health insurance, flexible working hours, and opportunities for remote work. Employees have access to ongoing training and development programs to enhance their skills and career progression. We foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment, encouraging innovation and teamwork. Additionally, CES provides performance\\-based incentives and recognition programs to motivate and reward outstanding contributions.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 CES is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, disability, or any other legally protected status. We believe that diversity enriches our workplace and drives innovation, and we are dedicated to fostering a culture of equity and inclusion.

title: Software Engineer (JavaScript)
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. Renowned for its innovative approach, Turing specializes in developing cutting\\-edge AI systems that transform industries and empower organizations worldwide. With a focus on research, development, and deployment of AI technologies, Turing has established itself as a pioneer in the field, fostering a collaborative environment that encourages innovation and excellence. The company values diversity, inclusion, and continuous learning, making it an ideal place for talented professionals to grow and make an impact in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role involves contributing to projects that focus on creating verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repository histories, utilizing synthetic approaches with human\\-in\\-the\\-loop methodologies. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software development, particularly with high\\-quality open\\-source repositories, and will play a crucial role in automating development environments, triaging issues, and evaluating test coverage and quality. This position offers a unique opportunity to influence the future of AI\\-assisted software development by working on innovative datasets that expand the capabilities of LLMs in solving real\\-world programming problems.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering.
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.
* Hands\\-on experience with version control systems, especially Git.
* Familiarity with containerization tools such as Docker.
* Ability to set up, configure, and navigate complex codebases.
* Experience in local codebase modification, testing, and debugging.
* Experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is advantageous.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in remote teams.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and dependency management.
* Evaluate unit test coverage and assess code quality.
* Modify and run codebases locally to test LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and other scenarios.
* Collaborate with research teams to identify challenging repositories and issues for LLM evaluation.
* Assist in designing synthetic datasets based on public repository histories, ensuring verifiability and coverage across different programming languages and difficulty levels.
* Lead or mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides numerous benefits, including the flexibility of a fully remote work environment, allowing you to work from anywhere. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside leading experts in the field, gaining valuable experience and exposure. Turing offers competitive compensation packages tailored to your expertise and dedication. Additionally, you will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization that values continuous learning, innovation, and professional growth. The company also promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, supporting your personal and professional development through various resources and initiatives.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe that diversity drives innovation and are dedicated to fostering a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our mission of advancing artificial intelligence technology.

title: Product Intern
description:
**About Avetria AI** 




  






 Avetria AI is an early\\-stage vertical AI company building intelligent tools for the news media industry. We help media organisations automate their editorial and operational workflows — enabling journalists and newsrooms to work faster and smarter. We are at an exciting inflection point, and every team member plays a meaningful role in shaping the product and the company.
 




  





**Role Overview** 




  






 We are looking for a sharp, curious Product Intern to join us for a 3\\-month engagement. You will work at the intersection of user research, product analysis, and operational support. This is a hands\\-on role — you will speak directly with users, dig into real product data, and help us make better decisions about where to take the product next.
 




  






 This is a great fit if you enjoy working closely with users, are comfortable with ambiguity, and want to see the direct impact of your work on a live AI product.
 




  





**What You'll Do** 




  





**User Research \\& Feedback Collection** 



* Conduct structured and informal conversations with users to gather feedback on the product.
* Document and synthesise user insights into actionable findings for the product team.
* Identify recurring pain points, feature requests, and unmet needs from user interactions.



  





**AI Output Analysis** 



* Review outputs generated by our AI product — a first\\-draft writing tool for journalists.
* Analyse user chat sessions with the AI to understand how journalists interact with the product.
* Map AI\\-generated drafts to corresponding published articles to evaluate output quality, accuracy, and relevance.



  





**Product Research \\& Analysis** 



* Research competitive products, industry trends, and best practices in AI tools for media.
* Assist in building frameworks or trackers to monitor product performance and user satisfaction.
* Support product operations as needed — including documentation, analysis, and reporting.



  





**Who We're Looking For** 




  




* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in any discipline (Engineering, Management, Journalism, Social Sciences, or related fields).
* Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking with users and synthesising what you hear.
* Analytical mindset with attention to detail; ability to spot patterns across qualitative and quantitative data.
* Genuine curiosity about AI, media, and the future of journalism.
* Self\\-starter who can work independently in a fully remote setup.
* Comfortable working in a fast\\-paced, early\\-stage environment where priorities can shift quickly.



  





**Preferred Profiles** 




  






 We prefer candidates from institutes such as IITs, NITs, VIT, BITS, or equivalent. That said, we care more about your thinking and drive than your institution — strong candidates from any background are welcome to apply.
 




  





**What You'll Gain** 




  




* Direct exposure to an early\\-stage AI startup and the news media industry.
* Hands\\-on experience across user research, product thinking, and AI product evaluation.
* Close collaboration with the founding team and real influence over product decisions.
* A strong addition to your portfolio with tangible, documented impact.



  





**Internship Details** 




  




* Duration: 3 months
* Type: Full\\-time (remote)
* Stipend: Paid (details shared during the interview process)
* Start Date: Immediate / As soon as possible

title: R&D Principal Engineer
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 R\\&D Global Unit Lead
   

  

  

  

  

  

**What We Believe In**
 ABB is a world leading provider of solutions for the energy industry segment. We have a multidisciplinary team located in centers around the world cooperating on product development. At the heart of ABB’s strategy is software\\-led differentiation and the Internet of Things, Service and People (IoTSP).
   

  

 This role will be reporting to the R\\&D Line Manager in business area Process Automation (PA) located in Bangalore. You will be working at Ability Innovation Center (AIC), home to the largest technology and engineering pool in ABB globally and is a part of ABB Global Industries and Services Private Limited, a subsidiary of ABB. It is based in Bangalore, the silicon\\-valley of India. Its unique infrastructure places research, development, engineering, and service teams under one roof, increasing collaboration and reducing time to market, with no compromise on quality.
   

  

 You will join a group of high\\-achieving engineers to lead and develop cutting edge industrial control applications for the Energy service industry. You will be contributing significantly to successful project results in technology and/or product development by identifying, proposing and implementing innovative solutions. Collaborating with teams in Norway, Sweden and Germany, the breadth of technologies and control strategies employed is broad. We are looking for someone who is technically very strong. The successful candidate will have a desire to work in a global, dynamic and challenging environment and will be highly rewarded from both a career and remuneration perspective. Opportunities will be available to develop their career in the future.
   

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will have the opportunity to initiate and drive technology, software, product, and/or solution development using in\\-depth technical expertise in a specific area. Each day, you will act as the first point of contact in Research and Development (R\\&D) for in\\-depth product or technology\\-related issues. You will also showcase your expertise by supporting strategic corporate technology management and future product/software/solution architecture.
   

  

 The work model for the role is: Hybrid
   

  

**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Technical Leadership \\& Innovation: Maintain deep expertise in the domain by applying the latest technologies, tools, and methodologies; contribute to architecture, design, and software development while exploring innovative solutions and validating new ideas.
* Software Development \\& Product Enhancement: Design, develop, maintain, and enhance core software components, implement new features and use cases, analyze and resolve system issues reported by customers, and effectively work with existing codebases.
* Collaboration, Documentation \\& Process Improvement: Participate in design discussions, documentation, and reviews; document technical outcomes; contribute to DevOps, CI/CD, and productivity improvement initiatives to enable faster and more reliable development and deployment.
* Knowledge Sharing \\& Strategic Contribution: Support IP generation and project IP strategies, provide technical training to internal teams or customers, and uphold ABB’s core values of safety, integrity, and accountability while collaborating effectively with the team.


**Qualifications for the role:**
* Education \\& Experience: B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech with 60% and above, with around 15\\+ years of experience, including 8–10 years of strong experience in designing and working on C\\#.NET projects.
* Core Technical Skills: Strong expertise in C\\#, .NET, .NET Core, ASP.NET, MVC, Web APIs, LINQ, Bootstrap, and task\\-based programming, with experience in microservices architecture.
* Programming \\& Design Knowledge: Deep understanding of Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP), OOAD concepts, and design patterns, with proven experience in software design, development, and building RESTful APIs.
* Database \\& Backend Expertise: Experience working with SQL (PostgreSQL), RDBMS, Time\\-series databases, and NoSQL databases, along with unit/component testing using xUnit, NUnit, or similar frameworks.
* Development Practices \\& Tools: Experience in web\\-based application development, working in Agile/DevOps environments, with exposure to CI/CD tools, containerization, Kubernetes/OpenShift, and preferably Microsoft Azure.
* Additional Technical Exposure: Knowledge of security protocols, authentication, authorization, cryptography, cybersecurity, and exposure to Industrial Automation domain is an added advantage; familiarity with Angular, HTML, and CSS is desirable.
* Personal \\& Professional Skills: Strong problem\\-solving ability, attention to detail, leadership skills, and stakeholder management, with the ability to work independently, adapt to fast\\-changing environments, communicate complex ideas effectively, and fluency in English (written and verbal).


**More About Us**
 Bring your very own sense of pride and purpose as you help us drive forward the Fourth Industrial Revolution – creating a sustainable future for our planet, and your career. Join ABB and harness the power of our diverse global network, as you collaborate with and learn from our world\\-class teams. Above all, challenge yourself every day.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application. If you want to discover more about ABB, take another look at our website www.abb.com.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
   

  

 Recruitment Fraud Warning
   

  

 ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.
   

  

 View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home
   

  

 For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\\-to\\-apply/fraud\\-warning

title: Android Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Tricog Health is a pioneering healthcare technology company dedicated to transforming cardiac care through innovative solutions. Our mission is to make advanced medical diagnostics accessible, affordable, and efficient by leveraging cutting\\-edge technology and data\\-driven insights. With a focus on improving patient outcomes, Tricog Health combines clinical expertise with innovative software development to deliver reliable and user\\-friendly cardiac imaging and analysis tools. Our team comprises passionate professionals committed to redefining healthcare standards and making a meaningful difference in people's lives worldwide.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a passionate Mobile Engineer eager to contribute to the development of high\\-quality mobile applications that support our mission of improving cardiac diagnostics. This role is ideal for individuals early in their career who are enthusiastic about mobile development, problem\\-solving, and learning new technologies. You will work closely with our experienced engineering, design, and product teams to create, test, and optimize mobile applications across Android, iOS, or Flutter platforms. Your contributions will directly impact real\\-world healthcare solutions, helping medical professionals deliver faster and more accurate diagnoses.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Strong foundation in programming principles, including Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOPS).
* Good logical reasoning and problem\\-solving skills.
* Basic understanding of data structures and algorithms.
* Knowledge of mobile application development fundamentals, including core components and lifecycle management.
* Familiarity with at least one mobile platform: Android (Kotlin/Java), iOS (Swift), or Flutter (Dart).
* Understanding of mobile UI development and state management concepts.
* Experience working with REST APIs and JSON data communication.
* Basic proficiency in version control systems, particularly Git.
* Exposure to unit testing or mobile testing practices is a plus.


**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain mobile applications compatible with Android, iOS, or Flutter platforms.
* Implement intuitive and efficient user interfaces following best practices for mobile usability.
* Integrate mobile applications with backend services through RESTful APIs to ensure seamless data flow.
* Identify and debug issues, enhancing application performance, stability, and user experience.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams, including engineers, designers, and product managers, during feature development cycles.
* Participate in code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and uphold coding standards to improve overall code quality.
* Write and support basic unit tests to ensure application reliability and facilitate continuous integration.
* Stay updated with emerging mobile development trends and incorporate best practices into projects.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work on impactful healthcare applications that directly benefit patients and healthcare providers.
* Collaborative work environment with a team of highly skilled professionals dedicated to innovation.
* Continuous learning and professional growth through exposure to the latest mobile technologies and practices.
* Flexible work arrangements and a supportive company culture that values work\\-life balance.
* Competitive compensation package with health benefits and other employee\\-centric perks.
* Participation in meaningful projects that contribute to societal well\\-being and healthcare advancements.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Tricog Health is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, age, religion, disability, or sexual orientation. We believe that diverse perspectives and experiences drive innovation and excellence, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our shared mission of transforming healthcare through technology.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Full-stack
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

 We are looking for experienced product development engineers/experts who could join our cloud product engineering team to build the next gen applications for our global customers. If you are a technology enthusiast and have passion to develop enterprise cloud products with quality, security, and performance, we are eager to discuss with you about the potential role.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Understand the business requirements and technical constraints and architect/design/develop.
* Participate in the complete development life cycle.
* Review the architecture/design/code of self and others.
* Develop enterprise application features/services using Azure cloud services, C\\# .NET Core, ReactJS etc, implementing DevSecOps principles.
* Own and be accountable for the Quality, Performance, Security and Sustenance of the respective product deliverables.
* Strive for self\\-excellence along with enabling success of the team/stakeholders.


**Requirements**
* 4 to 10 years of experience in developing enterprise software products
* Strong knowledge of C\\#, .NET Core, Azure DevOps
* Working knowledge of the JS frameworks – Preferably ReactJS
* Experience in container\\-based development, AKS, Service Fabric etc
* Experience in messaging queue like RabbitMQ, Kafka
* Experience in Azure Services like Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions
* Experience in databases like SQL Server, PostgreSQL
* Knowledge of reporting solutions like PowerBI, Apache SuperSet etc
* Knowledge of Micro\\-Services and/or Micro\\-Frontend architecture

**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. **About The Role**

Your expertise will help facilitate seamless integrations with various enterprise systems, ensuring optimal performance and user satisfaction. You will work closely with customers, internal teams, and product developers to deliver innovative AI solutions that transform employee support and productivity. This position offers an exciting opportunity to be at the forefront of enterprise AI technology, contributing to impactful projects across diverse industries and geographies. The successful candidate will possess strong technical acumen, excellent communication skills, and a passion for solving complex integration challenges, all while embodying our core values of outcome obsession, having fun, and prioritizing people over profit.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 2 years’ experience in a customer\\-facing technical role such as Customer Success Engineer, Solution Engineer, Implementation Engineer, or Forward Deployed Engineer.

* Familiarity with enterprise ITSM platforms like ServiceNow and Jira Service Desk, as well as Identity and Access Management (IDAM) solutions such as Okta and Active Directory, including integration processes.

**Responsibilities**
